title: New Year Music
description: Immerse yourself in the holiday spirit of your Minecraft world with the “New Year Music” mod! This mod introduces a new crafting recipe for the music player, allowing you to enjoy holiday tunes while building and exploring.
body:
Mod name: Mod “New Year Music”

Description:
Immerse yourself in the holiday spirit of your Minecraft world with the “New Year Music” mod! This mod introduces a new crafting recipe for the music player, allowing you to enjoy holiday tunes while building and exploring.

Features:

New Craft Recipe: Create your own music player using simple materials found in the game.
Nine New Holiday Records: Immerse yourself in the Christmas spirit with nine popular music tunes on disks, each containing popular tracks on the theme of the new year.
Interactive Experience: Play your favorite holiday songs while you decorate your home or party with friends in the game.
Celebrate the magic of the season by adding beautiful tunes to your Minecraft

ATTENTION!!! ALL TEXTURES OF THIS MOD ARE TAKEN FROM OPEN SOURCES OF THE INTERNET. ALL MUSIC RECORDED ON THE RECORDS IS NOT THE WORK OF THE MOD AUTHOR.
